title: Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) - Canada.ca
content:
## Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE)
Learn about tick-borne encephalitis (TBE), its causes, symptoms, risks, treatment and prevention. Also find information on surveillance and for health professionals.

## Services and information
Explore the cause of tick-borne encephalitis and how it is spread.
Learn about the symptoms, what to look for and what to do if you become ill.
Find out what the risks are and who is most at risk.
Access information on how tick-borne encephalitis is diagnosed and how it is treated.
Learn how tick-borne encephalitis can be prevented.
Discover how tick-borne encephalitis is monitored.

### For health professionals
Get detailed information for health professionals.
- Public Health Agency of Canada
